message:
Put stamps in window_group for proper workspace sliding

Stamps are back in window_group so they slide with workspace
transitions naturally. The meta_window crash is fixed by setting a
dummy meta_window property on the stamp layer that returns
NORMAL window type — GNOME Shell's layout.js only cares about
POPUP_MENU/DROPDOWN_MENU types, so NORMAL is safely ignored.

Also: hide all stamps during workspace switch animation
(switch-workspace signal), show correct workspace's stamps after
transition completes (active-workspace-changed signal). Set stamp
visibility on creation based on current workspace.

Preview popups use top_window_group (above everything).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
